source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) are calibrated from consulting engagements. industry_sources entries cite real published works that directionally support each lever's savings thesis.

levers.description: Shift 20-30% of workforce to Tier-2/3 Indian cities (Coimbatore, Indore, Bhubaneswar, Kochi) to capture salary arbitrage while maintaining quality.
industry_sources: NASSCOM GCC Report 2024 (nasscom.in) — Tier-2 salary differential 20-35% vs Bengaluru/Hyderabad for equivalent roles
Everest Group — GCC Location Strategy India 2024 (everestgrp.com) — Tier-2 cities offer 15-25% total cost advantage
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — specific savings range calibrated from 4 GCC location-shift engagements in India

levers.description: Automate repetitive transactional processes (data entry, reconciliation, report generation) using RPA bots and AI/ML models.
industry_sources: NASSCOM GCC 2024 (nasscom.in) — mature GCCs achieving 30-40% process automation
Everest Group — Automation in GCCs 2024 — 15-25% FTE cost reduction in transactional processes
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — savings range calibrated from RPA deployments in 6 India GCCs

levers.description: Right-size office space with hybrid work policy (50-60% seat utilisation target), renegotiate leases, exit high-cost CBD locations.
industry_sources: NASSCOM GCC 2024 — GCC real estate cost ₹14,000-₹28,000 per seat/month; hybrid reduces required seat count 30-40%
Everest Group GCC Location 2024 — real estate 8-12% of GCC cost base; 20-30% savings from hybrid policy
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — specific savings range from lease renegotiation in 3 India GCC mandates

levers.description: Structured career pathing, manager effectiveness programme, competitive benchmarked pay, and retention bonuses reduce attrition from 20%+ to 14-16%.
industry_sources: NASSCOM Strategic Review 2025 — cost of attrition estimated at 50-100% of annual salary per departure (recruiting + training + productivity loss)
Everest Group GCC Talent 2024 — attrition reduction from 22% to 16% saves 3-6% of total talent cost
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — GCC attrition programme savings calibrated from HR analytics engagements

levers.description: Consolidate fragmented software licences (multiple collaboration, project, HR tools); negotiate enterprise agreements for cloud/SaaS spend.
industry_sources: Gartner IT Key Metrics 2024 — IT services firms typically overspend on SaaS by 20-30% due to shadow IT
Everest Group GCC IT 2024 — tech infrastructure rationalisation saves 15-20% of IT cost
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — SaaS audit savings range from 3 GCC IT rationalisation engagements

levers.description: Centralise back-office functions (HR ops, finance ops, procurement) into a shared service centre model to eliminate duplication across business units.
industry_sources: Hackett Group World-Class G&A 2024 (thehackettgroup.com) — shared services reduces G&A cost by 20-30% vs. distributed model
NASSCOM GCC 2024 — GCCs delivering shared services to parent at 40-60% of equivalent onshore cost
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — savings range calibrated from 5 GCC shared services transitions

levers.description: Analyse subcontractor spend for roles that can be insourced at lower cost via permanent India GCC headcount. Renegotiate retained contracts.
industry_sources: Everest Group GCC 2024 — insourcing vs. third-party: 30-50% cost differential for equivalent delivery
NASSCOM GCC 2024 — subcontractor spend accounts for 6-12% of GCC cost in growth phase
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — insourcing savings range calibrated from 4 GCC strategic sourcing reviews

levers.description: Shift from classroom and vendor-led training to blended digital learning (Coursera, Udemy for Business, internal LMS). Tie training to billable skill creation.
industry_sources: NASSCOM Strategic Review 2025 — India IT/GCC spend on L&D: ₹30,000-₹80,000 per employee per year; digital-first reduces to ₹15,000-₹30,000
Gartner 2024 — digital learning platforms reduce training cost 40-60% vs instructor-led
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — training ROI optimisation savings from 3 GCC L&D transformation engagements
